title: Global irregular migration and trafficking in persons sanctions: guidance
body: "This guidance assists people in implementing and complying with the Global Irregular Migration and Trafficking in Persons Sanctions Regulations 2025. It covers the prohibitions and requirements imposed by the regulations. It also provides guidance on best practice for:   complying with the prohibitions and requirements enforcing them circumstances where they do not apply   This guidance should be read alongside more detailed sanctions guidance published by departments including the Home Office and HM Treasury, through the Office of Financial Sanctions Implementation (OFSI). "
